# BountyVerdict

> Know whether a public GitHub bounty is worth investigating before spending coding time, agent compute, or repository reputation.

## Free human checker

https://cristianmoroaica.github.io/bountyverdict/

Paste a canonical public GitHub issue URL. The browser performs read-only GitHub API requests and returns an evidence-linked AVOID, CAUTION, or VIABLE verdict without login or storage.

## Paid agent API

- Price: $0.05 USDC per successful fresh verdict
- Payment: x402 v2 exact scheme
- Marketplace: Coinbase x402 Bazaar after production settlement activation
- Free sample, OpenAPI contract, and llms.txt are served by the agent endpoint
- Source and integration contract: https://github.com/cristianmoroaica/bountyverdict/tree/main/agent

The paid check adds conventional repository contribution-document checks for explicit AI-work bans and disclosure requirements. Invalid or failed checks are not settled.

## Limits

A VIABLE verdict is permission to investigate, not a guarantee of reward availability, acceptance, merge, eligibility, or payment.
